items.caption: A stylized, cartoonish depiction of a hand with a bat-like appearance, sporting a pair of sunglasses and a tongue sticking out, set against a fiery background that resembles a burning explosion. the hand is adorned with spikes and has a black and white color scheme. the style of the image is reminiscent of heavy metal band artwork, with a nod to the "screaming hands santa cruz hand" and "kiss world" themes.
